title: podman run: -a is not an alias for --attach
body:
`podman run -a` is documented (and, as best I can tell, implemented) as a flag alias for `--attach` but:
```
                 -a                  |             --attach
-------------------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------
# podman run -a stdin fedora date    | # podman run --attach stdin fedora date
Mon Jun 11 16:56:11 UTC 2018         | dbea3b3189b731e7b636cfef087b48d1f78e629f867edbadc2135cbd7aa71c43
# podman run -a badvalue date        | # podman run --attach badvalue date
Mon Jun 11 16:57:58 UTC 2018         | invalid stream "badvalue" for --attach - must be one of stdin, stdout, or stderr: invalid argument
```

podman-0.6.3-1528484991.gitb78e7e4.fc28.x86_64

comments.body: This issue has been fixed with commit ab72130650c7, so we can close it.
